response.justification: Bogdan is a capable polyglot engineer with solid fundamentals and real high-throughput systems exposure at Dunnhumby, but the resume shows no meaningful experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing infrastructure, telemetry pipelines, or growth engineering — which are the core competencies this Principal-level role demands. His trajectory sits at Senior/Staff IC rather than Principal IC6, and there is no evidence of the cross-team platform ownership or statistical/analytical depth the position requires.
strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across diverse stacks including C, C++, TypeScript, Java, and DLang, satisfying the language breadth requirement
Proven experience with high-throughput distributed systems at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second, demonstrating low-latency and scalability chops
Open-source platform builder (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) showing ability to design and ship reusable infrastructure used by multiple teams
concerns: Zero explicit experimentation platform, feature flagging, or A/B testing experience — the single most critical technical domain for this role
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis work evident anywhere in the resume or project list
Current scope is Senior/Staff individual contributor; no demonstrated Principal-level cross-org technical leadership, architectural decision ownership, or measurable multi-team systemic impact

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or growth measurement background
